{{Quote|Here in the Shadowlands Rothrrrawr fought the great beast.|translated=1|Freyyr telling the tale of how Rothrrrawr lost [[Bacca's Ceremonial Blade]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Rothrrrawr''' was a [[Wookiee Chieftain]] who [[Death/Legends|died]] several years before the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Rothrrrawr was famous for traveling to the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and breaking [[Bacca's Ceremonial Blade]] in two when fighting a [[Terentatek/Legends|terentatek]]. The blade was stuck in the beast's hide, and Rothrrawr fled with the hilt. Afterwards, the hilt was seen as a symbol of leadership in his tribe, and was passed from chieftain to chieftain until [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] arrived on Kashyyyk, reuniting the blade and hilt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
